findings: GAP: No banned model list or validation exists - skills/SKILL.md and README.md reference model configs (line 110, 403, 415) but no enforcement mechanism blocks banned models. Models are passed through without validation.

Partial status requirement exists but no banned-model trigger - skills/SKILL.md:407 and README.md:130 state commanders must report 'partial' or 'failed' if full swarm cannot launch, but this only covers worker count, not banned model fallback.

No monitoring/alerting for banned model usage - while PID liveness checks exist (skills/SKILL.md:484-486), there is no model compliance monitoring. child-agents.jsonl tracks telemetry but does not flag banned models.

Silent failure risk: model field is passthrough - skills/SKILL.md:284 shows model is stored in run metadata, but no validation occurs at ingestion. A banned model would execute normally with no warning.

Recovery path undefined - skills/SKILL.md:772-836 covers crash recovery and requeue logic for dead workers, but no recovery pathway exists for banned model violations. Users cannot remediate because violations are not detected.
